prompt:
Vertical 4:5 portrait social-media poster, GTA Vice City aesthetic redesign for the Muha Members Giveaway. The REFERENCE image is the locked typography / palette / Muha logo / layout anchor — reproduce its: ornate gold Muha 'M' crest logo at the top center, the EXACT same chrome-and-red-rim 3D blocky GTA-style headline typography (matching the reference's font, weight, letter spacing, red outline thickness, drop shadow, slight italic stance, and chrome highlight gradient — pixel-for-pixel match of typography styling), red subtitle banner styling, lighting mood, and overall Vice City neon-noir feel. Reproduce the headline's distinctive vintage-arcade chrome-with-thick-red-outline look exactly.

NO QR CODE: do NOT include any QR code anywhere in this poster. Do NOT include any 'SCAN FOR APP' callout. The lower portion of the poster is purely the atmospheric VIP nightclub background.

PALETTE — LOCKED: dominant CRIMSON / SCARLET RED (#B81020 / #E0202C / #FF2F3F), deep black, wet-asphalt charcoal, warm gold accents on the Muha crest. ABSOLUTELY NO pink, NO magenta, NO teal, NO cyan, NO purple. Hot-red Vice City — like the rest of the Muha campaign.

HEADER TEXT: rendered in the EXACT same chrome-and-thick-red-rim 3D blocky GTA Vice City typeface as the reference — every detail of the headline typography (chrome surface gradient, red outline thickness, 3D extrusion, drop shadow, slight italic skew) must match the reference to the pixel. All caps, perfectly horizontally centered, taking two stacked lines exactly like the reference: line 1 'GET IN', line 2 'THE LIST'. The phrase is 'GET IN THE LIST' — NOT 'GET ON THE LIST'.

SUBTITLE: in the same red banner-bar styling as the reference, all caps, perfectly horizontally centered directly below the headline, reading exactly 'BECOME A MEMBER TODAY'. Red bar background, white-stroked text, same proportions as the reference subtitle.

MUHA LOGO: at the very top center, ornate gold filigree Muha 'M' crest, exact match to reference.

BACKGROUND — NEW UNIQUE CONCEPT, ALL-RED PALETTE: a GTA Vice City VIP nightclub entrance at night. Velvet-rope barrier with two glowing brass stanchions and a deep crimson rope; a chic doorway with a RED-NEON palm-tree silhouette sign above it; the words 'VICE CITY' subtly glowing in RED neon as part of the club facade (small, not competing with the headline); wet rain-slicked black asphalt and curb reflecting RED neon only; a hint of palm fronds backlit in red; a distant Miami night skyline with warm red-orange ambient glow on the horizon; a couple of out-of-focus silhouettes of stylish nightclub-goers in the distance suggesting an exclusive line, lit from behind by red neon. Opulent, exclusive, after-dark luxury VIP entrance. NO Dodge Challenger, NO stacks of cash, NO money piles anywhere.

Retain the reference's grain / halation / cinematic finish. Sharp focus on the headline, subtitle, and Muha logo; background is atmospheric with shallow depth-of-field. Photorealistic but stylized like a high-end editorial movie poster. No additional text beyond what's specified above.
refImages: Muha Giveaway Redesigned/Final/Get on the List.png
